description: Private hooks: guard against unsafe git push, bash tool substitutes, and wasteful Write rewrites; inject output-token protocols at session start

SessionStart.description: Inject output-token protocols Claude should respect for the whole session

PreToolUse.description: Block git push with arguments (use bare 'git push' or ! git push <args>)
Block bash grep/cat/find that duplicates Grep/Read/Glob tools
Normalize Bash: rewrite abs-path/quoted command words; auto-allow when every compound/pipe segment matches an allowlisted rule
Block repeated large Writes to existing files — prefer Edit to save output tokens
